'''sapuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibreglass|fibreglass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibreglass|fibreglass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sapuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || sæpichith || sæpichij || sæpichish || sæpichi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || sapupuchuth || sapupuchuj || sapupuchush || sapupuchu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || sapuchuth || sapuchuj || sapuchush || sapuchu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || sapufchufth || sapufchufj || sapufchufsh || sapufchuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sapuchuthu || sapuchuju || sapuchushu || sapuchuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || sapuchuth || sapuchuj || sapuchush || sapuchu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sapuchuthul || sapuchujul || sapuchushul || sapuchukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sapuchuuthuthu || sapuchuujuju || sapuchuushushu || sapuchuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || sapuchuthun || sapuchujun || sapuchushun || sapuchukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sapuchuthuoro || sapuchujuoro || sapuchushuoro || sapuchukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
